overview: A professional portfolio website for Srinidhi Kukutam, a BCA student specializing in Data Analytics and Business Intelligence. Designed to impress MNC recruiters with a modern dark navy design showcasing skills, projects, leadership, and a downloadable resume.
features: Hero section with name, title, and contact links
Project cards for ETL Pipeline, MindScribe, and Asha AI
Clickable LinkedIn, Gmail, and phone links
